title: poliodendron heterophyllum
intro: Poliodendron heterophyllum, also known as Poda or Kalmegh, is a type of plant native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rutaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Poliodendron heterophyllum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
